overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage depicting a slow walk along a rain-soaked elevated highway in Night City during a foggy night. The scene features neon-lit billboards, futuristic overpass architecture, passing vehicles, and transitions from open highway to enclosed concrete underpasses with heavy atmospheric fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with covered pedestrian walkway and commercial billboards

events.description: red sports car drives past on the left side of the highway
camera slightly shifts right while maintaining forward momentum

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the highway shoulder next to a covered walkway structure during heavy rain

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving past on the wet highway with headlights reflecting off the pavement

entered.detail: tall dark building with large illuminated red digital advertisements and multiple windows
enclosed pedestrian walkway with glass panels and orange structural trim running parallel to the highway
metal safety barrier separating the walkway from the road edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked elevated highway at night, with a massive commercial building featuring red digital billboards dominating the left side. The camera moves forward along the shoulder next to a covered walkway structure, while vehicles periodically pass by on the left. The atmosphere is thick with fog and artificial lighting from street lamps and building advertisements.

events.description: exits the commercial building area into a more open highway section under overpasses
dark sedan passes closely on the left with visible taillights

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway shoulder as the environment transitions to open overpass sections

notable_agents.action: dark colored sedan driving past with red taillights glowing in the fog

entered.detail: green illuminated road signs indicating directions to Watson district mounted on overpass
massive concrete highway overpass with support beams spanning across the road

segments.scene_description: The commercial building recedes as the scene opens into a wider highway section beneath massive concrete overpasses. Overhead signs indicate the Watson district ahead. The covered walkway structure falls back into the distance while vehicles continue to pass periodically. The lighting remains artificial with street lamps cutting through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed highway underpass with concrete retaining walls

events.description: entering enclosed highway section where open walkway is replaced by solid concrete walls
visibility decreases significantly as fog thickens and teal lighting becomes dominant

agents.ego_description: walking through the increasingly foggy and enclosed highway underpass with concrete walls on the right

entered.detail: smooth gray concrete retaining wall replacing the previous open walkway structure
thick structural pillars supporting the highway overpass above, creating a corridor effect

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a more enclosed underpass section where the open walkway is replaced by a solid concrete wall on the right. Massive support pillars line the path creating a corridor-like atmosphere. The fog thickens considerably, and the lighting shifts to a dominant teal hue from overhead fixtures, reducing visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep fog highway underpass with digital advertising screens

events.description: heavy fog reduces visibility to minimum, creating a dense atmospheric haze
bright street lamp causes lens flare and temporary glare

agents.ego_description: continuing through the heavily fogged corridor with extremely limited visibility, approaching distant light sources

entered.detail: large illuminated digital advertisement for El Guapo with white text and graphic design on dark background
distant doorway or opening emitting warm orange light visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through the deepest fog of the sequence, with visibility reduced to a minimum. An El Guapo digital billboard becomes visible on the left, while massive concrete pillars recede into the distance. The scene is dominated by teal and orange lighting contrasts, with a distant warm light glowing through the dense fog ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a rain-soaked elevated highway that transforms from an open, neon-lit commercial corridor into a claustrophobic, fog-shrouded underpass. It begins beside a covered walkway under the glow of massive red digital billboards, with vehicles passing through a thick atmospheric haze. As the commercial buildings recede, the scene opens into a wider highway section beneath towering concrete overpasses and district signage before the path narrows into an enclosed corridor. The environment then shifts as solid concrete walls and massive support pillars replace the open walkway, while the lighting transitions to a dominant teal hue that deepens the surrounding fog. Finally, the camera pushes through the densest mist where an El Guapo billboard emerges on the left, contrasting teal and orange lights against a distant warm glow.
